name: Zaal Panthaki
role: Web3 Founder & Builder — The ZAO / ZABAL
summary: Founder of The ZAO and ZABAL — the coordination layer for independent creators. Multi-chain tools, tested governance, real communities.

milestones.title: Mobed Training in India
milestones.summary: Completed Mobed (Zoroastrian priesthood) training in India as a teenager. Exact school, city, and curriculum details are Unknown.

milestones.title: Card & Board Games Club — President
milestones.summary: President of the Card & Board Games Club at Xaverian High School (2014-2017). Weekly meetings, organized tournaments, community outreach, membership growth.

milestones.title: Eagle Scout Rank & Senior Patrol Leader
milestones.summary: Served as Senior Patrol Leader (2015-2016) and completed Eagle Scout project at Hale Reservation, building erosion-prevention steps along a 65-foot path to the Nurses Station.

milestones.title: Eagle Scout Award Earned
milestones.summary: Earned Eagle Scout rank in 2016 after completing a community infrastructure project at Hale Reservation in Westwood, MA.

milestones.title: GDIT / Comtech Internship
milestones.summary: Technical Intern to Senior Technical Intern (2017-2020) across GDIT and Comtech, supporting NextGen 9-1-1 infrastructure, AWS/Terraform security changes, and field operations.

milestones.title: RIT Flag Football: Events Coordinator
milestones.summary: Executive board member. Organized tournaments, managed logistics, built team culture.

milestones.title: College Journey and RIT Engineering Path
milestones.summary: Started college in September 2017 and completed the RIT Electrical Engineering path, culminating in a B.S. in May 2022.

milestones.title: Joined M/E Engineering as Electrical Engineering Co-op
milestones.summary: Joined M/E Engineering as an electrical engineering co-op supporting CAD-based electrical design and contract drawing revisions.

milestones.title: Theta Chi Fraternity Leadership
milestones.summary: Held leadership and coordination roles. Managed events, budgets, and member relations.

milestones.title: Joined Wyman Gordon as Manufacturing Engineer Co-op
milestones.summary: Joined Wyman Gordon as a manufacturing engineering co-op supporting forging operations, compliance systems, and documentation digitization.

milestones.title: Web3 Academy: Learning Phase
milestones.summary: Joined Web3 Academy as a participant. First structured Web3 education beyond self-study.

milestones.title: Lean Six Sigma Yellow Belt Certification
milestones.summary: Earned Lean Six Sigma Yellow Belt certification, supporting process improvement and quality management in manufacturing engineering roles.

milestones.title: Graduated from RIT with Electrical Engineering Degree
milestones.summary: Graduated from RIT in May 2022 with a B.S. in Electrical Engineering (GPA 3.3).

milestones.title: Joined PCC Structurals as Automation Engineer
milestones.summary: Joined PCC Structurals in July 2022 to lead capital automation projects in aerospace manufacturing.

milestones.title: PCC Structurals
milestones.summary: Automation Engineer at PCC Structurals (July 2022 - July 2024). Capital projects up to $2M, 7x throughput, 50% faster inspection, 20% fewer production errors.

milestones.title: ZAO Formation Pivot
milestones.summary: Pivoted from ZTalent Agency to The ZAO in December 2022, based on guidance from Candy Toybox, formalizing a broader creator-community mission.

milestones.title: Web3 Academy DAO Ends
milestones.summary: The DAO wound down after a year of operation. Zaal took lessons about sustainability and governance.

milestones.title: First NFT Minted
milestones.summary: Minted first NFT as an experiment in onchain ownership. Exact platform, collection name, and asset details are currently Unknown.

milestones.title: FANUC Robotics Training Certification
milestones.summary: Completed FANUC robotics training certification, enabling management of FANUC robotic systems for automation projects.

milestones.title: Collaborations & Partnerships
milestones.summary: Cross-community collaborations with DAOs, music collectives, and Web3 ecosystems. 50+ communities engaged. Individual partnerships documented as child events.

milestones.title: First On-Chain Transaction
milestones.summary: Executed first blockchain transaction on Ethereum mainnet, transitioning from Web3 research into direct on-chain participation.

milestones.title: First DAO-Style Community: ETH PDX
milestones.summary: Joined ETH PDX, Portland's Ethereum community, as the first DAO-style collective he participated in. Exact join date and role details are Unknown.

milestones.title: ETH PDX Transitions to Inactive
milestones.summary: Portland's Ethereum community group wound down. Zaal shifted focus to remote-first coordination.

milestones.title: WaveWarZ Launch
milestones.summary: On-chain music battles on Solana. $50K+ volume (unverified), 50+ weekly listeners, automated payouts, zero exploits.

milestones.title: Twitter & Farcaster Spaces
milestones.summary: Regular governance calls, AMAs, and community discussions across Twitter and Farcaster. Foundation for ZABAL's cross-platform model.

milestones.title: ZAO Fractal Governance
milestones.summary: Weekly fractal democracy sessions. 77+ weeks running. 20+ Respect Games. Soulbound $ZAO Respect tokens. Recognized by Optimism Fractal.

milestones.title: First Twitter Space Appearance
milestones.summary: First time speaking live on a Twitter Space. Hosted by Love Story Unicorns (@LoveStoryGlobal). Recording status: Unknown.

milestones.title: ZAO Leaderboard System
milestones.summary: Gamified contribution tracking. Points for introductions, meetings, articles, and artist profiles. Soulbound $ZAO linkage.

milestones.title: First External Guest at Fractal Session (Approximate)
milestones.summary: First time an external community member or collaborator joined a ZAO Fractal governance session. Guest identity and session topic are Unknown.

milestones.title: First Hosted Twitter Space (Approximate)
milestones.summary: First time hosting a Twitter Space on X (Twitter), moving from guest to facilitator. Exact topic, guest list, and recording are Unknown.

milestones.title: First Referral Incentive Experiment (Approximate)
milestones.summary: Tested a 'bring 4 friends' incentive to earn bonus $ZAO Respect tokens. Exact mechanics and participation rates are Unknown.

milestones.title: First Space with External Community (Approximate)
milestones.summary: First Twitter Space co-hosted or cross-promoted with a community outside The ZAO's immediate network. Partner community and topic are Unknown.

milestones.title: First Recurring Space Format Established (Approximate)
milestones.summary: First instance of a regularly scheduled Space format (weekly or themed). Exact schedule and topic focus are Unknown.

milestones.title: Blockchain 101 Collectables (Unverified Details)
milestones.summary: Prototype onchain educational collectibles tentatively referred to as "Blockchain 101 Collectables." Public documentation is limited; many specifics remain unverified.

milestones.title: Internal Milestone: 10+ Respect Games (Approximate)
milestones.summary: The ZAO reached approximately 10 Respect Game sessions before external recognition from Optimism Fractal. Exact session count at this point is Approximate.

milestones.title: Why Blockchain Matters 4 Musicians
milestones.summary: First hosted event. Virtual workshop with Music Tech Connect on blockchain for independent musicians.

milestones.title: Produced First Event as Lead Organizer
milestones.summary: Led and organized the panel event 'Why Blockchain Matters for Musicians,' coordinating hosts, speakers, and educational flow.

milestones.title: Optimism Fractal Recognition
milestones.summary: ZAO Fractal featured on Optimism Fractal's feedback page. Third-party validation of governance model.

milestones.title: ZAO Governance Meetings Began
milestones.summary: Began recurring ZAO governance meetings focused on discussion-based coordination and decentralized decision-making.

milestones.title: ABB Robotics Training Certification
milestones.summary: Completed ABB robotics training certification, expanding capabilities in multi-vendor robotic systems management.

milestones.title: First Respect Game Scoring Adjustment (Approximate)
milestones.summary: First documented change to the Respect Game scoring or ranking rules. Specific adjustment and rationale are Unknown.

milestones.title: First Session Without Designated Facilitator (Approximate)
milestones.summary: First Respect Game session that ran without a single designated facilitator. Introduced a change in process toward distributed moderation.

milestones.title: First Farcaster-Native Space (Approximate)
milestones.summary: First live audio session hosted natively on Farcaster rather than Twitter/X. Exact date and format are Approximate.

milestones.title: ZAO-PALOOZA at NFT NYC
milestones.summary: Opening night of NFT NYC 2024. 15+ artists, 250+ RSVPs, 6 Web3 onboardings. April 3, 2024.

milestones.title: First Governance Session During IRL Event
milestones.summary: First time fractal governance ran during an in-person ZAO event (ZAO-PALOOZA at NFT NYC). Format adaptation details are Unknown.

milestones.title: First ZAO Respect Game
milestones.summary: Ran the first ZAO Respect Game, formalizing a weekly governance mechanism for decentralized participation and decision-making.

milestones.title: Jackson Laboratory
milestones.summary: Building Automation Technician at Jackson Laboratory (since Aug 2024). BAS/HVAC/fire reliability, 30% downtime reduction, 15% efficiency improvement.

milestones.title: Fractal Impact Concert
milestones.summary: Cross-fractal collaboration concert featuring Jose Cabrera, Fellenz Music, and DuoDo Musicia. Hosted by Dan Singjoy (Eden Fractal), EzinCrypto (Token Smart), and BettercallZaal (ZAO Fractal).

milestones.title: ZAO-CHELLA at Miami Art Basel
milestones.summary: Web3 music showcase at Art Basel Miami. 10+ artists, live WaveWarZ battle (Hurric4n3Ike vs Jango UU), free admission. December 6, 2024, 4PM-11PM.

milestones.title: Spaces in 2024
milestones.summary: Spaces matured into recurring governance infrastructure. Regular cadence across Twitter/X and Farcaster, supporting events, partnerships, and ecosystem coordination.

milestones.title: Year of the ZAO: Daily Newsletter
milestones.summary: 365-day writing challenge. Daily reflections, project updates, and community building on Paragraph. 500+ subscribers, 67+ supporters.

milestones.title: Student $LOANZ Launch on Base
milestones.summary: Student $LOANZ launched on Base via Flaunch as an onchain coordination hub for student debt. Innovation currently on pause; mission and learnings feed into ZABAL.

milestones.title: COC Concertz #1
milestones.summary: First COC Concertz metaverse show featuring AttaBotty and Clejan, with artist sets published via YouTube and community pages. Zaal served as host, event organizer, and technical streaming coordinator.

milestones.title: Podcast NFTs: Let's Talk About Web3
milestones.summary: On-chain podcast with EZinCrypto and Ohnahji. 19 episodes (Ep 0-18) on Base, 500+ subscribers, $8K+ ecosystem revenue.

milestones.title: Let's Talk About Web3: Episode 0 Minted
milestones.summary: First episode of Let's Talk About Web3 minted as an NFT on Base via pods.media. Marked the beginning of on-chain podcast distribution.

milestones.title: Let's Talk About Web3: First Guest Episode (Approximate)
milestones.summary: First episode featuring an external guest. Guest identity and episode number are Unknown; date is Approximate.

milestones.title: Heart of Ellsworth Promotions Committee Volunteer
milestones.summary: Volunteering on the Heart of Ellsworth Promotions Committee since August 2025, contributing to creative programming and downtown activation efforts.

milestones.title: ZABAL Development
milestones.summary: Cross-platform engagement token experiment. ERC-20 launch planned Jan 1, 2026. First 100 slots reserved for $ZAO holders. Built with SongJam leaderboard.

milestones.title: COC Concertz #2
milestones.summary: Second COC Concertz event with Fellenz opening, Stilo World WaveWarZ segment, and AttaBotty closing performance. Zaal served as host, event organizer, and technical streaming coordinator. Built as a collaboration with the Salty Sharks community.

milestones.title: Spaces in 2025
milestones.summary: Hosted, co-hosted, and attended community Spaces throughout 2025, with recurring WaveWarZ and ZAO conversations plus mutual community collaborations.

milestones.title: COC Concertz #3
milestones.summary: COC Concertz #3 in StiloWorld with Dúo Dø Musica, Jose Cabrera, and Stilo World plus an English vs Spanish WaveWarZ community battle. Zaal served as host, event organizer, and technical streaming coordinator.

name: CandyToyBox (Samantha)
summary: Co-founder of WaveWarZ and builder of its analytics/intelligence stack. Content creator across YouTube, X, and TikTok.

milestones.title: Co-founded WaveWarZ
milestones.summary: Cofounder of WaveWarZ — live-traded music battles on Solana, with Zaal and Hurric4n3ike.

milestones.title: Built WaveWarZ Intelligence & Analytics
milestones.summary: Shipped the WaveWarZ analytics and intelligence dashboards tracking battles, artists, and traders.

name: Jango UU
summary: ZAO co-founder and musician. Releases across Spotify, Apple Music, SoundCloud, and YouTube.

milestones.title: Co-founder of The ZAO
milestones.summary: One of the founding ZAO collaborators; artist within the ecosystem.

name: Attabotty
role: The ZAO + ZAO Festivals co-founder · artist
summary: ZAO co-founder and co-founder of ZAO Festivals, the live-events arm. ZAO-PALOOZA artist.

milestones.title: Co-founder of The ZAO
milestones.summary: A founding ZAO collaborator.

milestones.title: Co-founded ZAO Festivals
milestones.summary: Cofounder (with Zaal) of ZAO Festivals — the IRL/digital events arm behind ZAOstock.
